qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_cuil, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag) as n_totpag, sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor) as n_valor, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.{%=$AUX/@ig_fecha%}) as f_pago
FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ30_TOTALES, LIQ30_CONC_SUM, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS
JOIN LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo, LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_total INNER LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_total, LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_concepto INNER LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto INNER LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto
WHERE LIQ30_TOTALES.c_total = \'IGRET\' AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND GETPER(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.{%=$AUX/@ig_fecha%}) = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor > 0 AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' {%? (string($SOURCE/LIQS/LIQ/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string($SOURCE/LIQS/LIQ/@id)%}) %} {% %} %} {%? ($AUX/@noValidarCerradas!='1') {% AND isnotnull(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_cierre) %} {% %} %}
GROUP BY LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_cuil
UNION
SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_cuil, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag) as n_totpag, sum(LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor) as n_valor, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.{%=$AUX/@ig_fecha%}) as f_pago
FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ30_TOTALES, LIQ30_CONC_SUM, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS
JOIN LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo, LIQ30_TOTALES.oi_total INNER LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_total, LIQ30_CONC_SUM.oi_concepto INNER LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto INNER LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto
WHERE LIQ30_TOTALES.c_total = \'IGRETAA\' AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND GETPER(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.{%=$AUX/@ig_fecha%}) = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor > 0 AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' {%? (string($SOURCE/LIQS/LIQ/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion in ({%=string($SOURCE/LIQS/LIQ/@id)%}) %} {% %} %} {%? ($AUX/@noValidarCerradas!='1') {% AND isnotnull(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_cierre) %} {% %} %}
GROUP BY LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_cuil
ORDER BY c_nro_cuil ASC, f_pago ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: LiqIGDevengado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT e.d_valor FROM LIQ15_PARAM_EMP AS e, ORG26_PARAMETROS AS p JOIN e.oi_parametro INNER p.oi_parametro WHERE e.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} AND p.c_parametro = \'LiqIGDevengado\' ')/ROWS

qry:select.name: noValidarCerradas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'noValidarCerradas\'')/ROWS/ROW
